ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic centimeters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "inertia" REAL /* Inertia of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive system */,
  "emissions_rating" TEXT /* Emissions rating of the vehicle */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the production of the vehicle model started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the production of the vehicle model ended */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  "parent_company" TEXT /* Name of the parent company (if applicable) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the brand record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "origin_description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the origin is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the origin */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the origin */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the origin record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the metric was recorded */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in the version */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_versions_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_versions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  "reviewer_department" TEXT /* Department of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_position" TEXT /* Position or role of the reviewer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., engineering, marketing, consumer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the reviewer belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the reviewer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the reviewer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)
